S.FORM: Koyo Itiniay i Ruisui Cen no Hualien ko Koyo a niyaro', 424 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 976 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 29% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 283 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 71% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 693 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 20%, śííŚ•áśčČťõÖśóŹ1%, Truku 3%, Tayal 3%, Bunun 1%, roma 1%.
S.PHON: ko~ujo~u itiniaj i ro~u~uiso~u~ui ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u ko~ujo~u a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, ******%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, taja…ĺ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Koyo Itiniay i Ruisui Cen no Hualien ko Koyo a niyaro', 424 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 976 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 29% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 283 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 71% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 693 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 20%, śííŚ•áśčČťõÖśóŹ1%, Truku 3%, Tayal 3%, Bunun 1%, roma 1%.
S.PHON: ko~ujo~u itiniaj i ro~u~uiso~u~ui ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u ko~ujo~u a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, ******%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, taja…ĺ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%.
